title: feat: Add pages for managing work orders across different roles
description:
- Implemented Completed Work Orders page for both manager and technician roles.
- Created Create New Work Order page with data fetching for teams, users, sites, and templates.
- Developed Work Orders page with a table client for displaying work orders.
- Added Processing Work Orders page to show orders needing assignment.
- Built Supervisor Dashboard and Reports pages with respective components.
- Created Team Details and Add Member pages for team management.
- Implemented Work Order Details page for viewing specific work orders.
- Developed Checklist Attachments page with server-side data fetching and authorization checks.
- Added functionality for viewing all work orders with session-based filtering.
- Created pages for technician role to manage work orders similarly to supervisor role.

title: feat: Update work order management features
description:
- Refactored build script in package.json to use next build directly.
- Enhanced User model in Prisma schema to include completed and reviewed work orders, and uploaded attachments.
- Created new page for displaying all work orders with appropriate filtering.
- Implemented API routes for handling work order attachments, including file uploads and retrieval.
- Added counts API for work orders based on various filters and user roles.
- Developed pages for completed, processing, and creating new work orders with role-based access.
- Introduced client-side functionality for exporting completed work orders to Excel.
- Added task number and attachment models in Prisma with corresponding migrations.
- Implemented completion, review, and archiving features for work orders in the database schema.

Commit: f8fd92a11c22bd8ceca26db775966d53d9c77ad6
author: yohanessenbeto

title: feat: Add various scripts for user management, data import, and database operations
description:
- Implemented `check-login-users.ts` to verify user credentials and display user information.
- Created `check-relations.ts` to analyze user-team relationships and display sample data.
- Developed `check-seed.ts` to check the seeding status of the database and provide counts for users, teams, roles, and work orders.
- Added `import-staff.ts` for importing staff data from XLSX/JSON files, including role and supervisor mapping.
- Introduced `import-templates.ts` for importing PM templates from an Excel sheet into the database.
- Created `reset-db.ts` to reset the database by deleting all data in a safe order.
- Developed `seed.ts` to seed the database with default values for organizations, roles, regions, and zones.
- Implemented `test-authorize.ts` to test user authorization based on various identifiers.
- Added `test-login.ts` to test the login process via API calls.
- Configured `tailwind.config.js` for Tailwind CSS with custom themes and animations.
